title: How to Raise an Adult
author: Julie Lythcott-Haims
subline: Break free of the overparenting trap.
customHTML:
<svg viewBox="0 0 1600 2400" preserveAspectRatio="xMidYMid slice" style="position:absolute;inset:0;width:100%;height:100%">
  <!-- A staircase / age ladder: 0 to 18, but at the last step the child walks alone. The 18 step is RED. -->
  <g transform="translate(800 1100)" fill="none" stroke-width="2">
    <!-- 18 horizontal steps rising left to right, each smaller than the last (child grows up) -->
    <g stroke="#cccccc">
      <line x1="-540" y1="200" x2="-540" y2="160"/><line x1="-540" y1="160" x2="-490" y2="160"/>
      <line x1="-490" y1="160" x2="-490" y2="120"/><line x1="-490" y1="120" x2="-440" y2="120"/>
      <line x1="-440" y1="120" x2="-440" y2="80"/><line x1="-440" y1="80" x2="-390" y2="80"/>
      <line x1="-390" y1="80" x2="-390" y2="40"/><line x1="-390" y1="40" x2="-340" y2="40"/>
      <line x1="-340" y1="40" x2="-340" y2="0"/><line x1="-340" y1="0" x2="-290" y2="0"/>
      <line x1="-290" y1="0" x2="-290" y2="-40"/><line x1="-290" y1="-40" x2="-240" y2="-40"/>
      <line x1="-240" y1="-40" x2="-240" y2="-80"/><line x1="-240" y1="-80" x2="-190" y2="-80"/>
      <line x1="-190" y1="-80" x2="-190" y2="-120"/><line x1="-190" y1="-120" x2="-140" y2="-120"/>
      <line x1="-140" y1="-120" x2="-140" y2="-160"/><line x1="-140" y1="-160" x2="-90" y2="-160"/>
      <line x1="-90" y1="-160" x2="-90" y2="-200"/><line x1="-90" y1="-200" x2="-40" y2="-200"/>
    </g>
    <!-- Final 18 step — RED. The adult step. -->
    <g stroke="#fc1c46" stroke-width="3">
      <line x1="-40" y1="-200" x2="-40" y2="-240"/>
      <line x1="-40" y1="-240" x2="60" y2="-240"/>
    </g>
    <!-- A figure (dot) on each step from 1-9, then a single SOLID RED figure on the adult step -->
    <g fill="#4c4c4c">
      <circle cx="-515" cy="150" r="3"/><circle cx="-465" cy="110" r="3"/><circle cx="-415" cy="70" r="3"/>
      <circle cx="-365" cy="30" r="3"/><circle cx="-315" cy="-10" r="3"/><circle cx="-265" cy="-50" r="3"/>
      <circle cx="-215" cy="-90" r="3"/><circle cx="-165" cy="-130" r="3"/><circle cx="-115" cy="-170" r="3"/>
    </g>
    <!-- The 18+ figure — solid red, larger -->
    <circle cx="10" cy="-250" r="9" fill="#fc1c46"/>
    <!-- Label '18' tucked at the end -->
    <text x="80" y="-244" font-family="'Sui','Söhne','Inter',system-ui,sans-serif" font-size="22" font-weight="500" letter-spacing="0.04em" fill="#fc1c46">18</text>
    <!-- Sub-label '0' at the start -->
    <text x="-560" y="240" text-anchor="end" font-family="'Sui','Söhne','Inter',system-ui,sans-serif" font-size="11" font-weight="500" letter-spacing="0.18em" fill="#4c4c4c">0</text>
  </g>
</svg>
rationale: A literal staircase of 18 years — each step a child, all rendered in ash. The 18th step is RED, the only adult step. A larger red dot stands on it alone. The visual reads as the book: the journey from 0 to adult, with the adult step being the only one that belongs to the child. 320px mixed-case title at the bottom.
